description_long: This rifle features a long, metallic barrel with a wooden stock and grip, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The receiver and magazine are constructed from dark metal, with the magazine being a detachable box type located beneath the action. The wooden stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, while the fore-end is also wood, providing a comfortable grip. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch, for aiming. At the muzzle, a flash hider is attached, and the overall finish is a combination of matte metal and polished wood.
description: A classic rifle with a long metal barrel, wooden stock and grip, detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, front sight, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and grip, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and trigger area.
